title: Aida Sharif Rohani Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Aida Sharif Rohani Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Aida Sharif Rohani
Khoury Alumni
MS in Computer Science ’21
Silicon Valley Campus
Aida Sharif Rohani was ready to shift away from chemical engineering, but she struggled to find a master’s program in computer science that didn’t require a matching bachelor’s degree. Discovering the Align program opened a door for her to pursue her interests, ultimately leading her to a supportive community at NASA, where she currently works as a machine learning engineer.
All of my coworkers at NASA Ames and USRA, they were very welcoming … I had some doubts to … starting a master’s, but right now where I am I’m happy that I made that choice. Especially for people like me without the background in computer science, it’s a great opportunity
Aida Sharif Rohani, Align MSCS ’21
